entities.name: PIGEONPEA
entities.description: A legume crop studied for nitrogen fixation and uptake in different soils

entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: A non-fixing reference crop used in the 15N natural abundance method

entities.name: ICPL 84023
entities.description: An extra short duration pigeonpea genotype

entities.name: ICPL 151
entities.description: A short duration pigeonpea genotype

entities.name: ICPL 366
entities.description: A long duration pigeonpea genotype

entities.name: T7
entities.description: A long duration pigeonpea genotype

entities.name: NITROGEN FIXATION
entities.description: The process by which plants convert atmospheric nitrogen into a usable form

entities.name: NITROGEN UPTAKE
entities.description: The amount of nitrogen absorbed by the plant from the soil or atmosphere

entities.name: NODULATION
entities.description: The formation of nodules on roots to facilitate nitrogen fixation

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The amount of agricultural produce harvested per unit area

entities.name: PERCENTAGE NITROGEN DERIVED FROM THE ATMOSPHERE (%NDFA)
entities.description: The proportion of total plant nitrogen that comes from the atmosphere

entities.name: ABOVE-GROUND DRY MATTER
entities.description: The mass of the plant parts above the soil surface after drying

entities.name: NITROGEN CONTENT
entities.description: The total amount of nitrogen present in plant tissues

entities.name: 15N NATURAL ABUNDANCE TECHNIQUE
entities.description: A method using stable nitrogen isotopes to estimate nitrogen fixation

entities.name: N-DIFFERENCE METHOD
entities.description: A method to estimate nitrogen fixation based on the difference in nitrogen content between crops

entities.name: INCEPTISOL
entities.description: A type of soil in which pigeonpea genotypes were grown and studied

entities.name: ALFISOL
entities.description: A type of soil used as a comparison for nodulation and yield

entities.name: VERTISOL
entities.description: A type of soil used as a comparison for nodulation and yield

entities.name: MATURITY GROUP
entities.description: Classification of genotypes based on their growth duration, such as extra short, short, or long duration

entities.name: SUSTAINABLE AGRICULTURE
entities.description: Agricultural practices that are environmentally sound and productive over the long term

relationships.target: PERCENTAGE NITROGEN DERIVED FROM THE ATMOSPHERE (%NDFA)
